name: omarchy_troubleshooting
content:
Troubeshooting 
I broke my system with an update! 
First try to roback your system the version before your recent update. If that doesn't
work, use omarchy-debug  to share with your probem on #omarchy-hep in the Discord.
And if a that fais, you can reinsta the defauts configs and packages using omarchy-
reinstall.
Why are some apps so arge on my dispay? 
Omarchy assumes a 2x high-resoution dispay, which requires setting GDK_SCALE  to 2 in
~/.config/hypr/hyprland.conf. But if you're on a 1x dispay, you can change this to 1 (and
then restart any app that's oversized). See the manua on monitors.
For Spotify, you can use Ctrl + Minus  to shrink the UI (and Ctrl + Plus  to make it
bigger).
Why isn't Caps Lock working? 
In Omarchy, Caps Lock has been designated to be the xcompose key. That's how you get
quick emojis and other autocompetions done. If you reay miss using Caps Lock, you can
remape the xcompose key to something ese by editing ~/.config/hypr/input.conf, ike
setting it to the right at key:
kb_options = compose:ralt
Why are my externa speakers not paying? 
Probaby because they're not set as the primary output. Cick on the speaker in the top
right of the waybar, and it' aunch the voume contros where you can seect the primary
speaker (designate it as defaut with "d").
Troubleshooting · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/88/troubleshooting
1 of 3 2/2/26, 1:27 AM

---

Why can't I ogin or sudo with my password? 
You probaby typed it wrong too many times and got ocked out. If this is happening on the
ock screen, you can hit CTRL + ALT + F2 to start a new TTY where you can ogin as root,
then run faillock ��reset ��user [your-username]. That' reset the ockout, and you're
good to go.
Why isn't my 1Password authorization prompts
for 1Password SSH Agent / CLI appearing? 
This can happen for 2 reasons:
In order for the rich approva prompt to appear, Settings > Advanced > Use Hardware
Acceeration must be turned on. Note: This requires a reboot to begin working.
Troubleshooting · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/88/troubleshooting
2 of 3 2/2/26, 1:27 AM

---

Or if you haven't aunched 1Password since booting up, the prompt wi not appear.
Troubleshooting · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/88/troubleshooting
